title: Try REI Grove+ for Just $1
description: Get 7 days of full REI Grove+ access — Ledgre accounting, RE Sidekick, market data, legal forms, and more — for a single dollar. Certain restrictions apply, see Terms for details.

title: Save $40 a Year with Annual Billing
description: REI Grove+ is $20/month, or lock in $16.67/month when you bill annually — that's $200/year instead of $240.

title: Meet RE Sidekick, Your AI Investing Partner
description: Get answers, find resources, and analyze deals without digging through a dozen tabs — RE Sidekick comes free with every REI Grove+ membership.

title: State-Specific Leases & Legal Forms, Included
description: Lawyer-developed leases and quitclaim deeds for all 50 states — a $100+ per-state value — come standard with REI Grove+.

title: Real-Time Market Data, On Demand
description: Rent estimates, property valuations, and market comparisons for any address or zip code — powered by RentCast, exclusively for REI Grove+ members.

title: Free Accounting Software, On Us
description: REI Grove+ includes a full Ledgre membership — real estate accounting software worth $330/year — at no extra cost.

title: Everything You Need to Grow, in One Membership
description: Spreadsheets, worksheets, premium eBooks, and deal analysis calculators — REI Grove+ bundles hundreds of dollars in tools for $20/month.
